TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Maylubung, title = Maylubung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maylubung} }

S.FORM: alang Maylubung ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 191 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Maylubung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Maylubung hya' ga Maytayax. tay 'llaw na Maylubung hya' ga B'anux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Maylubung ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 66 buwan, 191 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Maylubung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maylubung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Maylubung hya' ga Maytayax. tay 'llaw na Maylubung hya' ga B'anux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ majluβuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa majtajax. taj ʔllaw na majluβuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βʔanux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
